name: рҹҢә | Springfever event | Location of the flowers | Not a bot | рҹҢә
description:
рҹҢә | Springfever event | Locations of the event flowers | рҹҢә

в”Ҹв”Ғв”Ғв”ҒвңҰвқҳај»ајәвқҳвңҰв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”“

Day 1:

Flower : рҹҢј

Hint: вҖңTodayвҖҷs bloom awaits where the event comes alive...вҖқ

Location: When clicking on the Springfever event banner, it will take you to a page dedicated to the event. Scrolling down a little will result in you finding the first flower above some text. ThatвҖҷs the first flower.

в”—в”Ғв”Ғв”ҒвңҰвқҳај»ајәвқҳвңҰв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”ӣ

в”Ҹв”Ғв”Ғв”ҒвңҰвқҳај»ајәвқҳвңҰв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”“

Day 2:

Flower: рҹҢ·

Hint: вҖңTodayвҖҷs bloom hides where new stories are born...вҖқ

Location: First click on your profile, it will open a menu. Then, click on create a character. When on the create a character page, scroll down until you reach the bottom. The flower will be hidden under the create character button. ThatвҖҷs the second flower.

в”—в”Ғв”Ғв”ҒвңҰвқҳај»ајәвқҳвңҰв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”ӣ

в”Ҹв”Ғв”Ғв”ҒвңҰвқҳај»ајәвқҳвңҰв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”“

Day 3:

Flower: рҹӘ»

Hint: вҖңTodayвҖҷs blooms rests where the rules of the garden are written...вҖқ

Location: For this flower, you will need to go to the community guidelines. When you open the guidelines page, it will be in between the first piece of text and the second. ThatвҖҷs the third flower.

в”—в”Ғв”Ғв”ҒвңҰвқҳај»ајәвқҳвңҰв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”ӣ

в”Ҹв”Ғв”Ғв”ҒвңҰвқҳај»ајәвқҳвңҰв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”“

Day four:

Flower: рҹҢ№

Hint: вҖңTodayвҖҷs bloom is tucked where your name is set in stone...вҖқ

Location: First, click on your profile, this will open up a menu. The click on the settings. The flower will be above your username. ThatвҖҷs the fourth flower.

в”—в”Ғв”Ғв”ҒвңҰвқҳај»ајәвқҳвңҰв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”ӣ

в”Ҹв”Ғв”Ғв”ҒвңҰвқҳај»ајәвқҳвңҰв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”“

Day: 5

Flower: рҹҢә

Hint: вҖңTodayвҖҷs bloom hides where youвҖҷre personas take shape...вҖқ

Location: First, click on your profile, this will open up a menu. Click on my personas. Scroll to the bottom of the page and the flower should be hidden under the last persona made. ThatвҖҷs the fifth flower.

в”—в”Ғв”Ғв”ҒвңҰвқҳај»ајәвқҳвңҰв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”ӣ

в”Ҹв”Ғв”Ғв”ҒвңҰвқҳај»ајәвқҳвңҰв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”“

Day: six

Flower: рҹӘ·

Hint: вҖңToday's bloom is hiding where your stories begin...вҖқ

Location: First, click on your chats on the bar at the bottom of the page. This will take you to the вҖҳYour chatsвҖҷ page. Scroll to the bottom and it will be under your first chat. ThatвҖҷs the sixth flower.

в”—в”Ғв”Ғв”ҒвңҰвқҳај»ајәвқҳвңҰв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”ӣ

в”Ҹв”Ғв”Ғв”ҒвңҰвқҳај»ајәвқҳвңҰв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”“

Day: 7

Flower: рҹҢ»

Hint: вҖңthe final bloom awaits where scripts come to life...вҖқ

Location: First, click on your profile and this will open up a menu. Press onto script beta and this will open the scripts page. The flower will be at the bottom of the scripts page. ThatвҖҷs the final flower.

в”—в”Ғв”Ғв”ҒвңҰвқҳај»ајәвқҳвңҰв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”ӣ
creator: PowerPellet
